# clickfolio.me

> Turn your resume into a website. Upload a PDF, AI parses it, get a shareable portfolio in 30 seconds.

## About
clickfolio.me converts PDF resumes into hosted web portfolios using AI-powered parsing. Free, open-source, and deployed on Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://clickfolio.me
- Explore Directory: https://clickfolio.me/explore
- Privacy Policy: https://clickfolio.me/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://clickfolio.me/terms

## Portfolio URLs
User portfolios are available at: https://clickfolio.me/@{handle}

## Features
- PDF resume upload and AI parsing (OpenAI via OpenRouter)
- 10 professionally designed portfolio templates
- Custom @handle URLs
- Privacy controls (hide phone, address, search indexing)
- Referral system for premium template unlocks
- Public directory of professionals
- Real-time parsing status via WebSocket
- Mobile-responsive templates
- Open Graph and structured data for rich link previews

## Tech Stack
- Cloudflare Workers (compute)
- Cloudflare D1 (database)
- Cloudflare R2 (file storage)
- vinext (Vite-based Next.js)
- Better Auth (authentication)
- Drizzle ORM

## Contact
- Support: support@clickfolio.me
- Source: https://github.com/divkix/clickfolio.me
